name: Redstone Resources Limited
description: Redstone Resources Ltd (ASX: RDS) is a Perth-based company focused on highly prospective copper exploration properties in the West Musgrave region of Western Australia. The company's flagship asset is the 100% owned Tollu Project, which features a large swarm of hydrothermal copper-rich quartz veins. Redstone has delineated a maiden Mineral Resource at Tollu and continues to explore multiple targets within the region, leveraging the area's favorable geological setting to identify potential magmatic nickel-copper sulphide and hydrothermal copper-gold deposits. The company remains committed to unlocking the significant upside potential of its extensive tenement holdings.
